title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ET Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
